polygon.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px; fill: white; fill-opacity: 0.95;

circle.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 1px; fill: none;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 1px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
transform-box: fill-box; transform: rotate(45deg); transform-origin: center center; fill: none;
